source_progression_description: Castle final bridge — horizontal bridge tiles over lava; collapses when Mario hits end-of-castle axe
base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of assembled_structure_bridge_to_bowser — a tile from 1985 super mario bros. Castle final bridge — horizontal bridge tiles over lava. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
